Fixture 1: Cold Start (Iteration 1)
- Scenario: First iteration, no PRD provided
- Invocation: build_prompt(0, "", 1)
- Expected Behavior: Codebase analysis mode, full SDLC instruction, no resume context, no queue
- Key Variables:
  - analysis_instruction: Present (no PRD)
  - prd_anchor: "Loki Mode"
  - memory_context_section: Empty (no prior context)
  - checklist_status: Empty (no PRD file)
  - queue_tasks: Empty (no queue)
- Test: Verify analysis_instruction appears in static prefix
